_comment: Feature flags that MUST be true in production. Generated from the live app (GET /api/console/flags) on 2026-07-09 and reviewed by Glen, after a root-cause dig found EIGHT flags had been silently deleted from the Render service — five still off, disabling a Stripe monthly checkout, the two-door reveal, the prepay ladder, analysis-quota enforcement and the review flow. scripts/surface_check.py's daily watchdog alerts on any of these not being on. TURNING A FLAG OFF IS A PULL REQUEST: remove it here. Render sells no audit log on this plan, so git is the only record of who intended a flag to be off. Leading-underscore names (_REVIEWS_ENABLED etc) are module-internal aliases whose env var is spelled without the underscore — deliberately excluded. A flag absent from this list is silent: new flags default off.
